raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "dark_box (left box)",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both arms can reach the left and right side faces of the dark box without colliding with the adjacent light box or the cup in front; enough lateral clearance exists to place palms/fingers on the side faces.",
    "Postcondition": "The dark box is constrained laterally by both end-effectors, preventing sliding while preparing for a lift."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "dark_box (left box)",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The box is stabilized; both end-effectors are aligned on opposite side faces at mid-height with sufficient frictional contact to generate a secure pinch grasp; no interference with the light box during finger closure/inward motion.",
    "Postcondition": "The dark box is securely grasped by both arms and is no longer resting on the table (lifted slightly)."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: Both arms can reach the left and right side faces of the dark box without colliding with the adjacent light box or the cup in front; enough lateral clearance exists to place palms/fingers on the side faces.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The dark box is constrained laterally by both end-effectors, preventing sliding while preparing for a lift.

parsed_json.Precondition: The box is stabilized; both end-effectors are aligned on opposite side faces at mid-height with sufficient frictional contact to generate a secure pinch grasp; no interference with the light box during finger closure/inward motion.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The dark box is securely grasped by both arms and is no longer resting on the table (lifted slightly).
